mapper.sql: id, goods_no, goods_name, category_id, goods_introduce, goods_content, goods_state, goods_picture, goods_market_price, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into goods (id, goods_no, goods_name, category_id, goods_introduce, goods_content, goods_state, goods_picture, goods_market_price, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsPicture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsMarketPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into goods
id,
goods_no,
goods_name,
category_id,
goods_introduce,
goods_content,
goods_state,
goods_picture,
goods_market_price,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsPicture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsMarketPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update goods
goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_introduce = #{goodsIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_content = #{goodsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_state = #{goodsState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goods_picture = #{goodsPicture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goods_market_price = #{goodsMarketPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update goods set goods_no = #{goodsNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_name = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_introduce = #{goodsIntroduce,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_content = #{goodsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_state = #{goodsState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goods_picture = #{goodsPicture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goods_market_price = #{goodsMarketPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select id, goods_no, goods_name, category_id, goods_introduce, goods_content, goods_state, goods_picture, goods_market_price, create_time, update_time from goods
goods_name like concat('%',#{goodsName},'%')
and goods_content=#{goodsContent}
order by create_time desc
